_meta.method: Web research on Dharma Drum Malaysia, Plum Village Malaysia retreats, Soto Zen / Sotoshu directory for Malaysia.
_meta.coverageEstimate: Medium. Malaysia has many Mahayana temples but few that practice zazen/Chan in a sustained way; we list the institutional Chan/Zen ones.
knownGaps: No standing Plum Village monastery in Malaysia; retreats are co-organized with Singapore Sangha and Thai Plum Village.
Bodhiyana retreat reference in source brief not verified to a current organizational URL.
Smaller Sanbo Zen / Rinzai lay groups not located via sourced URLs.

places.name: Dharma Drum Mountain Malaysia Centre
places.address: Near Kwasa Damansara MRT Station, Selangor, Malaysia
places.notes: Malaysian branch of Dharma Drum Mountain; new five-story centre with meditation hall and rooftop walking-meditation space, 30 minutes from KL.
